LanguageData.GasTrap.label: IED toxic gas trap
LanguageData.GasTrapRage.label: IED rage gas trap
LanguageData.GasTrapSleepGas.label: IED sleep gas trap
LanguageData.GasTrapFearGas.label: IED fear gas trap
LanguageData.GasTrapAcid.label: IED corrosive gas trap
LanguageData.GasTrapMechanoidVirus.label: IED nanomachine trap
LanguageData.GasTrapAntiBugGas.label: IED insecticide gas trap
LanguageData.GasTrap.description: A toxic gas shell connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.GasTrapRage.description: Ar rage gas shell connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.GasTrapSleepGas.description: A sleep gas shell connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.GasTrapFearGas.description: A fear gas shell connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.GasTrapAcid.description: A corrosive gas shell connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.GasTrapMechanoidVirus.description: A nanomachine shell connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
LanguageData.GasTrapAntiBugGas.description: A insecticide gas shell connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. Animals can sense these when calm.
